title: Why Your Etsy Print Looks Blurry — 72 DPI vs 300 DPI Explained
description: Your file looks fine on screen but arrives blurry at print. The culprit: DPI. 72 DPI at 8×10 = 576×720px. 300 DPI at 8×10 = 2400×3000px. That's the minimum for a sharp print. SnapToSize always exports at 300 DPI — every size, every ratio, automatically. No guesswork.
